name: spectral-scor-poc
description: This is a Proof of Concept (POC) for using the **Spectral** linter to secure SCOR's API specifications. It incorporates standard OpenAPI rules and the **OWASP API Security Top 10** ruleset to detect common security vulnerabilities early in the design phase.

scripts.lint:json: mkdir -p results && for spec in specs/*.yaml; do name=$(basename "$spec" .yaml); spectral lint "$spec" --ruleset owasp23-ruleset.spectral.yml --format json --output "results/${name}_spectral.json" || true; done
scripts.pipeline: npm run lint:json && npm run score && npm run dashboard
